title: brassia forgetiana
intro: Brassia forgetiana, also known as the Forget-Me-Not Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Brassia forgetiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
